TestCase z31Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_sample2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_sample2, t1.sample2, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.sample2 = follow_case_sample2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: add 1.0 to all elements of sample2
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.sample2[i] += 1.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
